evt_012.label: Drop
evt_012.basis: Company G stated that it would not continue in the process.
evt_012.source_text: Company G indicated it would not continue in the process

evt_017.label: DropAtInf
evt_017.basis: Company H said it could not increase its indicated value range after previously bidding $5.00 to $5.75 per share.
evt_017.source_text: Company H was not able to increase its indicated value range

evt_022.label: Drop
evt_022.basis: WDC reevaluated its interest and said it was not prepared to move forward at that time.
evt_022.source_text: WDC had decided to reconsider its interest in acquiring sTec and that it was not prepared to move forward with a transaction with sTec at that time

evt_023.label: Drop
evt_023.basis: Company D said it could not conduct due diligence on the required timetable and was disengaging from the process.
evt_023.source_text: Company D would not be in a position to actively conduct due diligence for more than two weeks and was disengaging from the process

evt_025.label: Formal
evt_025.basis: Proposal after final round announcement/deadline with no informal signals.

cycle_1.basis: First formal proposal in cycle: evt_019.

initiation_judgment.basis: The board was already reviewing strategic alternatives because of operating pressure, while Balch Hill separately pressed the board to explore alternatives.
initiation_judgment.source_text: our board of directors determined that it would be beneficial to undertake a formal review of strategic alternatives, including exploring a potential sale of sTec

advisor_bofa_merrill_lynch.source_text: the board approved retaining BofA Merrill Lynch to act as sTec's financial advisor

advisor_gibson_dunn.source_text: Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher LLP, which had been engaged in October 2012 as the company's outside corporate counsel

advisor_latham_watkins.source_text: Latham & Watkins LLP, litigation counsel to sTec and Mr. Manouch Moshayedi

count_reconciliation.assertion: In total sTec executed six non-disclosure agreements related to the exploration of a potential sale of the company.
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly: six bidder NDA events were extracted.
